steps.t: Complete 'Agoroth, the Narrowdelve' on any difficulty. Use the Instance Finder to enter Agoroth, the Narrowdelve.
The Angmarim have been defeated and the Helcessar destroyed. You should speak to Lothrandir. He can be found inside Agoroth, inside Jä-reitti, or at t…
The Angmarim have been defeated and the Helcessar destroyed. You should speak to Arvedui. He can be found inside Agoroth, inside Jä-reitti, or at the …
You have won a great victory against Angmar and freed Arvedui from his fate. You should return to Elrond in Rivendell and inform him of your success.
